title: expandOption
description:
On the returned data, expand:
  * `ChildItems` - Child items, e.g. multiple packages that are part of the parent package
  * `Restocks` - Restock items
  * `StoresList` - List of stores
  * `SalesLocations` - Sale locations
  * `DeliveryPrice` - Deliver Price
  * `CollectPrice` - Collect Price
  * `DisplayLocations` - Display locations
  * `DeliveryTime` - Delivery time
  * `FoodAvailabilities` - Food availability
